Investor in Mathpresso (d.b.a. Qanda), Contents Technologies, DroptheBit (acquired by Goodnotes), BigwaveRobotics, N.Light, RebuilderAI, Databank, Camel, The Gifting Company, Gluga, Levit (d.b.a. KB Investment is the venture capital subsidiary of KB Financial Group, investing in seed to late-stage companies across consumer, enterprise, bio/healthcare, fintech spaces.

position.title: Co-Founder and CEO
position.description: Where your life context becomes understanding.

position.title: Founder
position.description: I bootstrapped an e-commerce brand for organic produce that connected farmers and fisheries directly with customers, using a computer vision model to ensure freshness. We grew it to over $2M in annual revenue. I started my entrepreneurial journey selling tons of fruit — so I genuinely believe I can sell anything.
